name: Multiple linear regression with VIF and prediction
prompt: Read housing_data.csv with columns: sqft, bedrooms, age, price. Build a multiple linear regression model predicting price from sqft, bedrooms, and age. Steps: (1) compute correlation matrix between all variables, (2) fit an OLS regression model, (3) report coefficients, R-squared, and p-values for each predictor, (4) check for multicollinearity using VIF (variance inflation factor). Write regression_results.json with: correlations (4x4 matrix as object or array), model ({r_squared, adj_r_squared, f_statistic, f_p_value}), coefficients (array of {variable, coefficient, std_error, p_value, significant}), vif (array of {variable, vif_value}), prediction ({predicted_price for sqft=2000, bedrooms=3, age=20}).

criteria.description: regression_results.json exists and is valid JSON
sqft coefficient is positive and significant
VIF values present for all 3 predictors
Prediction for sqft=2000, bedrooms=3, age=20 is in range 200000-350000

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
